description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that uses the node:14 Docker image, runs only on the master branch, executes `npm install`, `npm run jison`, `npm run lint`, and `npm run build`, and stores the resulting `dist/` directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs in the production environment using the kroniak/ssh-client image, also only on master, runs SSH setup commands (`mkdir -p ~/.ssh`, write a config disabling strict host key checking, `eval $(ssh-agent -s)`, `ssh-add <(echo "$PRIVATE_KEY")`) and then copies the built files with `scp -r dist/* $SERVER_USER@$SERVER_HOST:$APP_PATH`. No caches or services are defined.
